acquisition method: For DIA acquisition, the precursor range was set to 380–980 m/z
cleavage agent: allowance for up to two missed cleavages, trypsin digestion with cleavage after K or R
collision energy: MS2 fragmentation was performed using 28% HCD collision energy
fragmentation method: MS2 fragmentation was performed using 28% HCD collision energy
instrument: coupled to an Exploris 240 Orbitrap mass spectrometer
